DP.128.0000:
It’s a pair of binoculars...
Put $100 in it?
DP.128.0002:
Tell me I’m not imagining this...\f
The Great Marsh’s Pokémon seem to be
different from the ones yesterday...
DP.128.0003:
Use a pair of binoculars to look out
over the Great Marsh.\f
You can see what kinds of Pokémon
can be caught, and where they are.
DP.128.0004:
There are shuttle trains in the
marsh called Quick Trams.\f
You should take those if you’re going
to a deeper area in the marsh.
DP.128.0005:
When you’re walking on the bog,
you sometimes sink right in...\f
I get so flustered trying to get out,
I have no luck catching anything.
